title: Level 650
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 650: "Colorless Torture"}}__NOTOC__{{User:Muqon/Theme1}}
> Skip
[[File:BlackVoid.png|2000px]]
[[File:Septemolddd.png|center|frameless|300x300px]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} ''Black and white memories flash before my eyes...'' ''Why did I do that?'' ''An extraordinary darkness came, and took away all that was bright. I don't like it.'' ''I'm freezing.''
[[File:Septemold2.png|center|frameless|300x300px]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} "Dude, what the hell are you talking about? Come on, come on, we're gonna get out of here, okay? Yeah, I promise you. I promise you, okay? Come on!" ''Ah, these promises never end.'' ''Still, as I always do, I try to help him, even when I am miserable myself. I accept his offer without saying much.'' "Okay... just, uh, well, you know... I'm a little tired. I don't think it's a problem. This is... It's all black and white. It's interesting, isn't it?"
[[File:Septem2.png|center|frameless|300x300px]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} ''Even though I know this is going to be a terrible journey and I would rather lie here and die, I choose to move forward.'' ''Was there a wedding here or not? This place reminds me of the loneliness and boredom of picking up all the mess after a party is over...'' "I certainly don't like the way this place makes me feel..."
[[File:Septem3.png|center|frameless|300x300px]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} "What did you say?" "Ah?" ''Did I say that out loud?'' ''Either way, it's true. I don't like it here. Backrooms is a goddamn hell and I hate it-'' ''Did I get too mad?''
[[File:Septem4.png|center|frameless|300x300px]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} "Whoa, wow, what the hell is this?" ''He points me to the words written in a deep hole in the wall. In a low voice I start reading the texts.'' "All right, all right. Give it up, don't you think its about time already? You're not going
A N Y W H E R E." "What the hell?" ''I analyze the text with a deep sense of awkwardness. This doesn't sound like something an ordinary wanderer would write.''
[[File:Septem5.png|center|frameless|300x300px]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} ''Something inside me says, 'OK, that's enough. It's not a big deal anyway, it's better to just sit here and wait.''' ''As soon as I hear myself say that, I feel my feet give up and I fall to the ground, I didn't mean to do it, but that's what I wanted. I don't have much energy left anyway. It's better this way.'' ''The voice inside me keeps whispering: 'Okay, okay. That's great! It's cool man, easy...'''
''I'm very comfortable, you know, I'm really comfortable. There's no problem. I'm not a mess.'' ''But for some reason my teammate Larry doesn't think so.'' "What the hell?! Adam, get up! This isn't fun! Come on, get up!" ''I try to tell him that everything is very good, but I'm sure it's quite unnecessary. I think it'll be fine. I get a few words out of my mouth without trying too hard.'' "Cool, good. Relax." ''You can tell he's terrified, I don't understand why! Does he think I'm crazy?''
''I'm not sure at what point, but after a while he started to agree with me.'' ''At one point, something happened. Like I woke up or something. "What the hell is going on? What are we waiting for?" blah, blah, blah. I'm just brushing it off, thinking I'll care about it later.''
{{Background|file=Septem4.png}}
Level 650 ---- Colorless Torture
---- '''Level 650''' is the 651st level of the Backrooms.
'''Description'''

[[File:Septem1.png|300px|link=]]
The famous image of '''Level 650'''.


'''Level 650''' seems to be the ruins of an ancient church. Cracked white walls made of bricks or concrete and tall windows can often be found on the level. The ground is usually dry grass or dirt. The size of the level is unknown since "The Voice" stops the wanderers. Also because it stops the wanderers, there is no known exit out of the level. The level is completely black and white. This is known to be the case since the level's atmosphere contains some sort of organism that causes the light to refract differently than it does in [[The Frontrooms]]. This is why the light can be concentrated very intensely in some areas, or some areas may have no light at all. The level, '''The Voice''' to be exact, gives people hopelessness. The Voice whispers to the wanderers in the level, telling them not to waste any more time and that they keep going in a circle, and it can convince them very easily. After spending some time on this level, the wanderers lose all motivation to do anything. The main challenge to exploring the level is this. Even the most determined individuals found it difficult to make it through the level and eventually gave up. It is not known why The Voice is stopping people, but it is being investigated. The interview efforts have been unsuccessful. However, it is thought that The Voice is blocking the wanderers because it is hiding something. Nevertheless, this idea has not been proven and remains a rumor. Although most areas of the level are lit by lamps and flashlights, or by an unknown light, some areas may be dark. In these darker regions, '''The Voice''' seems to be louder and more powerful. In addition, unpleasant, intense smells were noticed in some parts of the level. The air temperature is constant throughout the entire level and is 8°C (46°F). The low temperature of the level also helps the wanderers to let go and just sit and wait following the sound of '''The Voice'''.
'''Additional Information'''

[[File:Septem2.png|300px|link=]]

The wanderers' despair and hopelessness increase by the fact that the level is in black and white. This helps '''The Voice''' and makes traveling exceedingly challenging. Studies show that as time goes on, the level is increasingly intolerable, and '''The Voice''' increases the pressure. In addition, most of the communication devices at the level were found to be working properly. It is known that most of the information about the level is obtained through these communication devices.
'''Entities'''

'''The Voice'''

'''The Voice''' is one of the factors that most increases the survival difficulty of '''Level 650'''. The Voice convinces the wanderers at the level to let go and sit and wait. It destroys the wanderers' energy and will to move forward. Although not much is known about The Voice, it is presumed to follow the wanderers all the time. There isn't any information about where it originated or how it was created. The wanderers who were caught by The Voice, meaning all the wanderers who have entered the level so far, have been found dead after a while. A note about The Voice was found in the Level.
Ah, the voice... Ah, the convincing voice... Let me go, I beg you... You won't even let me say "Enough!", voice... Who are you? Why won't you let me out? I don't like you, voice..
[[File:TheVoicevisual.png|300px|link=]]
A visual representation of The
Voice (It's always watching you).


'''Colonies and Outposts'''

{{Collapse|num=c1|initial=
'''> Guardians'''
|final=
'''< Guardians'''
|body= The Guardians are a group of wanderers dedicated to protecting helpless wanderers who have fallen to '''Level 650'''. The guards protect the wanderers from '''The Voice'''. They do not allow any danger to be present. They are gone, though.
[[File:Septemold2.png|300px|link=]]
}}
'''Logs'''

{{Collapse|num=f1|initial=
'''> Open File: Discovery'''
|final=
'''< Close File: Discovery'''
|body= "Quick, run!"
"I'm trying!"
"I DON'T want to be eaten by that thing!"
"Quick, let's go to that room!"
"Okay..!"
''After entering a black and white room, the wanderers are teleported to another place''
"Ah, where are we?"
"I guess we escaped, but this place is..."
"We're in another level. Hang on, which level is this?"
"I don't know. Let me search."
"..."
"Ah... This isn't in the database."
"Oh my- did we just discover a new level?!"
"Seems like it. I'm freezing though, I don't like this place."
"Well, let's continue. It should be OK right?"
"I don't know. Uh, before we continue. Let's sit and relax for a bit.."
"What- you know what? You're right."
"Close the recording we'll continue later."
}}
'''Notes'''

{{Collapse|num=n1|initial=
'''> Open Found Note #1'''
|final=
'''< Close Found Note #1'''
|body=
{{Blurquote|image=Septem1.png|quote-text=This place drains all my energy, until there's nothing left. I have nothing left. I stare at the black and white walls. I think they're just like me. No color, just black and white. I can't even move anymore, because I don't need to. Everything is already over, I have no energy left, I have nothing left. It's the end. It's a shame. Oh, whatever.|person=Wanderer}}
}} {{Collapse|num=n2|initial=
'''> Open Found Note #2'''
|final=
'''< Close Found Note #2'''
|body=
{{Blurquote|image=Septem2.png|quote-text=I took my first step, looked up, which resulted in a quick turn of my head. I was dazzled. The only thing I feel when I look up here is... Terror. I could only get the words "What the hell is this?" out of my mouth. I'm thinking to myself, " Oh, shouldn't I have come?" And then, then I hear a little voice: "Anyway, there's nothing to do. I'll just wait." I can't understand at first, did I say that or someone else? Nevertheless, this offer is very tempting to me. I say "yes", then, then, I think of my friends who gave up halfway through. Didn't I promise them? Didn't I tell them I would finish? The voice inside me speaks again: "Forget it, they are gone now, they can't hear you." "Are you sure?" I say to the voice. Then I realize that it is not me I am talking to, and I am horrified.|person=Another wanderer}}
}}
'''Entrances and Exits'''

'''Entrances'''

'''-''' Entering a black and white room in [[Level 402]] can take one to '''Level 650'''.
'''-''' Entering a hut made of bricks at [[Level 240]] can take one to '''Level 650'''.
'''Exits'''

There is no known exit from '''Level 650'''.
